raw:
## Completed
Applied the requested planner fixes. Tightened the planner prompt so proposed gates are only real repo commands, removed the verify-command override, and added planner prompt/frontmatter assertions.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - planner contract now requires only real repo commands for proposed gates.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - planner task prompt now treats `verifyCommand` as legacy fallback only, not an automatic proposal.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - added assertions for required planner model/tools and no legacy `proposedManifest`/CTO override contract.

## How To Verify
```bash
bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh
```

## Notes
Verification passed. Foreman task is still waiting at ship approval; I did not auto-approve Gate 2.
